leak_risk: none (no hidden TVT used; GR+typewell+anchor+Z+MD only)
notes: Discrete state DP/Viterbi: state=TVT_bin(50 bins ±50ft), transition=gaussian penalty on dTVT from prior, emission=GR likelihood. Globally optimal path. Complementary to exp022 PF (local stochastic search). ProcessPoolExecutor over wells.
